message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Create User Profile

actor "User" as user
participant "API Gateway" as api_gateway
participant "Auth-Service" as auth_service
participant "User-Service" as user_service

user -> api_gateway: POST /api/users
activate api_gateway

api_gateway -> auth_service: check authorization
activate auth_service
auth_service --> api_gateway: http_status: 200
deactivate auth_service

api_gateway -> user_service: POST /api/users
activate user_service
user_service --> api_gateway: http_status: 200
deactivate user_service

api_gateway --> user: profile created..
deactivate api_gateway

@enduml
```
